title: April 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 8''' is the 98th (99th on leap years) day of the year. There are 267 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[John Madden]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Femi Taylor]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Sung Kang]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Nnedi Okorafor]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Katee Sackhoff]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Shelby Young]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Alfredo Alcala]] dies.
*[[2004]] – "[[Chapter 20 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Clone Wars Chapter 20]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 4|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 4]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[David Jones]] dies.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance: Premonition]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Nicky Katt]] dies.
*[[2026]] – [[Shadow of Maul 2|''Shadow of Maul'' 2]] to be published.
